goals: Store personal preferences about communication style for future AI assistant interactions
Search for previously stored preferences to verify they were saved correctly
List all stored memories to review what information has been captured
Delete outdated or unnecessary memories to clean up storage

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and hands-on, accustomed to working with animals rather than technology. Approaches new tools with curiosity but needs clear value to engage.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in horse training but unfamiliar with AI memory systems. Does not know technical tool names or APIs, only knows they want to personalize their AI assistant experience.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored preferences, verified they were saved, reviewed all stored memories, and cleaned up any unnecessary ones.
